name: gemma-code
description: Local agentic coding assistant powered by Gemma 4 via Ollama

gemma-code.maxTokens.description: Maximum context tokens (Gemma 4 supports 128K for E2B/E4B, 256K for 26B/31B)

gemma-code.toolConfirmationMode.description: When to prompt for confirmation before running terminal commands or editing files. 'always': always ask. 'ask': ask for destructive operations only. 'never': run without confirmation (use with caution).

gemma-code.maxAgentIterations.description: Maximum number of agentic tool-use iterations per user message before the loop terminates.

enumDescriptions: Show a diff and ask for confirmation before applying any file edit.
Automatically accept and apply all changes without prompting.
Produce a plan before taking action and show diffs for review.
gemma-code.editMode.description: Controls how Gemma Code applies changes. 'ask': show diff and confirm. 'auto' (Accept): apply immediately. 'plan': produce a plan first.

gemma-code.thinkingMode.description: Enable Gemma 4 thinking mode (<|think|>) for chain-of-thought reasoning before tool use and complex responses.

enumDescriptions: Brief, direct instructions optimized for experienced developers.
Step-by-step instructions with technical term definitions for new developers.
gemma-code.promptStyle.description: Controls the verbosity and style of the system prompt sent to the model.

gemma-code.systemPromptBudgetPercent.description: Percentage of the context window reserved for the system prompt (base instructions + tool declarations). Range: 5-30%.

gemma-code.compactionKeepRecent.description: Number of most-recent messages preserved during sliding-window context compaction.

gemma-code.compactionToolResultsKeep.description: Number of most-recent tool results to preserve during compaction (older results are replaced with one-line summaries).

gemma-code.useBackend.description: When true, Gemma Code starts a local Python FastAPI backend that handles prompt formatting and context management. When false, the extension talks directly to Ollama.

gemma-code.backendPort.description: Port for the local Python inference backend. Change this if 11435 conflicts with another service.

gemma-code.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python executable used to start the backend (e.g. 'python3' or an absolute path to a virtual-environment interpreter).

gemma-code.memoryEnabled.description: Enable persistent memory system for cross-session context recall.

gemma-code.embeddingModel.description: Ollama embedding model for semantic memory search. Set to empty string to disable semantic search.

gemma-code.memoryAutoSaveInterval.description: Number of messages between automatic memory extraction runs.

gemma-code.memoryMaxEntries.description: Maximum number of memory entries before automatic pruning.

gemma-code.mcpEnabled.description: Enable Model Context Protocol (MCP) support for interoperability with external tools.

gemma-code.mcpServerMode.description: MCP server mode. 'stdio' exposes Gemma Code tools via MCP stdio protocol. 'off' disables.

gemma-code.verificationEnabled.description: Automatically run a verification sub-agent after multiple file edits to check for bugs and test failures.

gemma-code.verificationThreshold.description: Number of file edits in a session before automatic verification triggers.

gemma-code.subAgentMaxIterations.description: Maximum tool-use iterations for sub-agents (verification, research, planning).
